_note: Manual quarterly competitor estimates. Update each quarter. Sources: public Play Store rankings, SimilarWeb, AppTweak free tier, industry reports. No API — owner fills these in.
_update_instructions: Edit these values each quarter based on: App Store rankings, SimilarWeb traffic estimates, industry blogs, and your own download analytics from Play Console once wired.

competitors.name: HealthifyMe
competitors.key_strengths: Market leader, AI calorie counting, vernacular support, strong brand
competitors.key_weaknesses: Generic plans, expensive premium, bloated app
competitors.nyus_advantage: Personalized AI coach, Indian meal plans, clean UX, affordable

competitors.name: Cult.fit
competitors.key_strengths: Offline gyms + live classes, strong community, diverse content
competitors.key_weaknesses: High cost, gym-dependent, not truly personalized nutrition
competitors.nyus_advantage: AI-first nutrition + workout, lower cost, no gym needed

competitors.name: MyFitnessPal
competitors.key_strengths: Massive food database, brand recognition, barcode scanning
competitors.key_weaknesses: Generic, no Indian meal plans, no AI coaching, US-centric
competitors.nyus_advantage: Indian-first, AI coach, workout plans, holistic (not just calories)

competitors.name: Nike Training Club
competitors.key_strengths: Brand, curated workouts, clean UI, free
competitors.key_weaknesses: No nutrition, no personalization, no India focus
competitors.nyus_advantage: Full nutrition + workout + AI coaching, Indian context

competitors.name: StepSetGo
competitors.nyus_advantage: Complete health platform vs step counter

competitors.name: Fitterfly
competitors.key_strengths: Clinical partnerships, diabetes reversal programs, doctor-guided
competitors.key_weaknesses: Disease-specific niche, high cost, not for general fitness
competitors.nyus_advantage: General fitness + nutrition for healthy users, more accessible

competitors.name: Ultrahuman
competitors.key_strengths: CGM glucose tracking, Ring wearable, bio-hacker community, premium brand
competitors.key_weaknesses: Very expensive hardware (Rs 15k+ ring), niche tech-savvy user only
competitors.nyus_advantage: No hardware required, affordable, AI meal+workout plans for mainstream

competitors.name: Noom
competitors.key_weaknesses: Expensive subscription ($60/mo), US-centric food database, no Indian context
competitors.nyus_advantage: Indian meal plans, local food database, AI coach, far lower price

competitors.name: Fittr
competitors.key_strengths: Strong coach community, transformation programs, India-first
competitors.key_weaknesses: Coach-dependent (not always AI-first), limited meal plan depth
competitors.nyus_advantage: AI-generated plans 24/7, instant coach responses, no waiting for human coach

nyus_benchmarks._note: Fill play_rating + play_reviews from Play Console once wired. mau + downloads_total from DB + Play reporting once the SA has reporting scope. Package: com.nyus.nyusand

health_accuracy_benchmarks._note: Scientific reference accuracy for NYUS's calculation models. These are baseline error rates from peer-reviewed literature — not NYUS-specific measurements. Owner: once you have 10+ users with chest-strap HR data, replace est_ values with measured_.
health_accuracy_benchmarks.bmr_source: Frankenfield et al. J Am Diet Assoc 2005 (N=47 studies, ±8-10% typical error)
health_accuracy_benchmarks.calorie_burn_source: Keytel et al. Int J Sports Med 2005 (±15-20% vs indirect calorimetry, ±10% with BF% input)
